overview: Hum Honge Kamyab is a government-branded CSR platform for Shree Cement's youth empowerment initiative. It serves students, job seekers, employers, center managers, and admins with role-based dashboards, course enrollment, placement tracking, job portal, and SMS/OTP-based authentication with real-time notifications.
features: SMS/OTP phone-based login with 6-digit verification code
Real-time notification polling with unread badge
Role-based dashboards for Admin, Student, Employer, Job Seeker, Center Manager
Job portal with search, applications, and placement tracking
